children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For the purpose described in , there is established in the State a conservation area to be known as the Sloan Canyon National Conservation Area.section 460qqq of this title

children.heading: Area included
children.label: b Area included
children.text: The Conservation Area shall consist of approximately 57,728 acres of public land in the County, as generally depicted on the map.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary shall submit to Congress a map and legal description of the Conservation Area.November 6, 2002

children.heading: Effect
children.label: 2 Effect
children.text: The map and legal description shall have the same force and effect as if included in this section, except that the Secretary may correct minor errors in the map or legal description.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: 3 Public availability
children.text: A copy of the map and legal description shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate office of the Bureau of Land Management.
